parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header Intel Corporation
footer Proprietary and Confidential
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

actor "User/Admin" as User

box "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #LightBlue
participant CLI
participant "Af Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #LightGreen
participant NEF
participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
end box

note over NEF: Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

group Policy Authorization - Individual Application Session Context creation flow
    User -> CLI: Create application session\ncontext
    CLI -> AF: /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions\nPOST
    AF -> NGC: /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions\nPOST
    NGC --> AF: 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
    AF --> CLI: 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
    CLI --> User: Success: app-sessionId
end

@enduml
```
